# Syringe Aesthetics

> Nurse-practitioner-owned med spa in Dallas, TX, founded by Manuel Guillen, FNP-C. Specializes in natural, conservative Botox and dermal filler treatments. Bilingual care in English and Spanish.

## Business
- Name: Syringe Aesthetics
- Founder & injector: Manuel Guillen, FNP-C (Family Nurse Practitioner, Certified)
- Experience: 7+ years in aesthetic medicine
- Address: 1151 N Buckner Blvd Ste 408, Dallas, TX 75218
- Phone / Text: (214) 713-9693
- Languages: English, Spanish
- Hours: Mon 10:00am-4:00pm; Tue-Sat 10:30am-4:00pm; Sun by request

## Treatments
- BOTOX Cosmetic: forehead lines, frown lines, crow's feet, platysma bands
- JUVEDERM Ultra XC: lips, lower facial lines
- JUVEDERM Ultra Plus XC: lower facial lines
- JUVEDERM VOLLURE XC: lower facial lines
- JUVEDERM VOLUX XC: jawline
- JUVEDERM VOLBELLA XC: lips, undereye hollows
- JUVEDERM VOLUMA XC: cheeks, chin, temples
- SKINVIVE by JUVEDERM: cheeks, skin quality
- KYBELLA: submental fullness (under the chin)

- Home: https://syringeaesthetics.com/index.html

## Booking
- Online: https://syringeaesthetics.myaestheticrecord.com/online-booking
- Text: (214) 713-9693
- Call: (214) 713-9693

## Notes
Syringe Aesthetics is an Alle Rewards-eligible provider for BOTOX Cosmetic and JUVEDERM products. Pricing is confirmed at consultation and not published, as treatment plans are individualized.
